option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:background="@color/background_light">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:background="@color/white" app:elevation="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:titleTextColor="@color/black" app:navigationIconTint="@color/black" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<!-- Landscape variant: reduce sizes/paddings so the Analyze button fits without scrolling --> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/aiCoachScrollView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/padding_default">
<!-- AI Coach Character/Header (smaller) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/card_padding">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ai_emoji" android:textSize="@dimen/emoji_size" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/ai_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFrequencyStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ai_frequency_default" android:textColor="#757575" android:textSize="@dimen/text_small" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Data Summary Card (smaller paddings and fonts) --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ai_data_label" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="12sp" android:textAllCaps="true" android:paddingBottom="6dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:strokeColor="#E0E0E0" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProgressData" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="@dimen/padding_default" android:text="@string/ai_no_habits" android:textColor="#424242" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:textSize="@dimen/text_small" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- AI Response Card (smaller) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cvCoachInsight" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/card_padding">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ai_coach_advice" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="12sp" android:textAllCaps="true" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCoachMessage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/ai_thinking" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/text_subtitle" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Action Area: smaller height so it fits on shorter landscape screens --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGenerateInsight" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/action_button_height" android:text="@string/ai_analyze_button" app:cornerRadius="24dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/purple_500" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ai_tip_change_frequency" android:textColor="#757575" android:textSize="@dimen/text_small" android:textAlignment="center" />
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:background="@color/background_light">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:background="@color/white" app:elevation="0dp">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" app:titleTextColor="@color/black" app:navigationIconTint="@color/black" />
</com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<!-- Daily Reminder bar: full width, no padding, reduced text sizes (1/4 smaller) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/reminderSection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingStart="@dimen/margin_small" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/margin_small" android:paddingTop="@dimen/margin_small" android:paddingBottom="@dimen/margin_small" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/white" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Daily Reminder" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/text_small" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSetReminderTime" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="8:00 PM" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvManageHabits" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/reminderSection" tools:listitem="@layout/item_habit" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/addHabitSection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/margin_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="12dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnAddHabit" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="@dimen/card_padding">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNewHabitTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="New Habit" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"/>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCancelHabit" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:tint="@color/black" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvNewHabitTitle">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnEmojiPicker" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/emoji_button_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/emoji_button_size" android:text="✨" android:textSize="18sp" android:padding="0dp" app:cornerRadius="10dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" app:hintEnabled="false" app:boxBackgroundMode="none">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etHabitName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="What's your habit?" android:background="@android:color/transparent" android:padding="6dp" android:textSize="@dimen/habit_name_size" android:textColor="@color/black" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/btnAddHabit" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="@dimen/fab_margin" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:backgroundTint="@color/purple_500" app:tint="@color/white" app:elevation="8dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background_light" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<!-- Vertical guideline at 50% of width to split screen in half --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/guideline_half" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.5" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/progressCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_margin="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="24dp">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/circularProgressBar" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="200dp" android:indeterminate="false" android:max="100" android:progress="0" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/circular_progress_bar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/circularProgressBar">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPercentage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0%" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0 done, 0 left" android:textColor="#757575" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvHabits" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" tools:listitem="@layout/item_habit" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEmptyState" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tap the + to add your first habit!" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="#757575" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<nl.dionsegijn.konfetti.xml.KonfettiView android:id="@+id/konfettiView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background_light" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<!-- Vertical guideline at 50% of width to split screen in half --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/guideline_half" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.5" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/progressCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_horizontal" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="@dimen/card_padding">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/circularProgressBar" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="@dimen/progress_circle_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/progress_circle_size" android:indeterminate="false" android:max="100" android:progress="0" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/circular_progress_bar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/circularProgressBar">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPercentage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0%" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textSize="@dimen/text_percentage" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0 done, 0 left" android:textColor="#757575" android:textSize="@dimen/text_subtitle" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvHabits" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" tools:listitem="@layout/item_habit" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEmptyState" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tap the + to add your first habit!" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="#757575" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_half" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<nl.dionsegijn.konfetti.xml.KonfettiView android:id="@+id/konfettiView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/habitCard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="@dimen/margin_horizontal" android:layout_marginVertical="@dimen/margin_small" app:cardCornerRadius="10dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="@dimen/habit_item_padding">
<TextView android:id="@+id/habitEmoji" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="@dimen/habit_emoji_size" android:text="⭐" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/habitName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Habit Name" android:textSize="@dimen/habit_name_size" android:textColor="@color/black" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/checkMark" android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@android:drawable/checkbox_on_background" android:visibility="gone" app:tint="@color/white" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/habitCheckbox" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" app:buttonTint="@color/purple_500" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/deleteButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_delete" android:visibility="gone" android:contentDescription="Delete habit" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background_light" app:layout_behavior="@string/appbar_scrolling_view_behavior">
<!-- Use 40% / 60% split for tablets: progress on left, habits on right --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/guideline_tablet" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.4" />
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/progressCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_margin="@dimen/margin_horizontal" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_16" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/guideline_tablet" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="@dimen/card_padding">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/circularProgressBar" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="@dimen/progress_circle_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/progress_circle_size" android:indeterminate="false" android:max="100" android:progress="0" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/circular_progress_bar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/circularProgressBar" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/circularProgressBar">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPercentage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0%" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" android:textSize="@dimen/text_percentage" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0 done, 0 left" android:textColor="#757575" android:textSize="@dimen/text_small" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvHabits" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/margin_small" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/margin_horizontal" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_tablet" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" tools:listitem="@layout/item_habit" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvEmptyState" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tap the + to add your first habit!" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" android:textColor="#757575" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/guideline_tablet" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <!-- Landscape adjustments: reduce vertical spacing to fit more content --> <dimen name="margin_horizontal">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_small">6dp</dimen> <dimen name="padding_default">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_padding">16dp</dimen>
<dimen name="progress_circle_size">240dp</dimen>
<dimen name="text_percentage">26sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_title">18sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_subtitle">13sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_small">11sp</dimen>
<dimen name="action_button_height">52dp</dimen> <dimen name="fab_margin">48dp</dimen>
<dimen name="emoji_size">56sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_emoji_size">20sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_name_size">16sp</dimen>
<dimen name="habit_item_padding">12dp</dimen> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Small phones: scale down slightly --> <dimen name="margin_horizontal">14dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_small">6dp</dimen> <dimen name="padding_default">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_padding">18dp</dimen>
<dimen name="progress_circle_size">120dp</dimen> <dimen name="progress_bar_height">10dp</dimen>
<dimen name="text_percentage">24sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_title">18sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_subtitle">13sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_small">11sp</dimen>
<dimen name="action_button_height">52dp</dimen> <dimen name="fab_margin">12dp</dimen>
<dimen name="emoji_size">56sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_emoji_size">20sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_name_size">16sp</dimen>
<dimen name="habit_item_padding">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_size">50dp</dimen> <dimen name="checkmark_size">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_small">2dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_medium">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_large">12dp</dimen>
<dimen name="elevation_0">0dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_small">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_medium">8dp</dimen>
<dimen name="line_spacing_extra">4dp</dimen> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Larger phones / tablets: scale up slightly --> <dimen name="margin_horizontal">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_small">10dp</dimen> <dimen name="padding_default">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_padding">28dp</dimen>
<dimen name="progress_circle_size">220dp</dimen> <dimen name="progress_bar_height">16dp</dimen>
<dimen name="text_percentage">36sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_title">22sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_subtitle">16sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_small">13sp</dimen>
<dimen name="action_button_height">68dp</dimen> <dimen name="fab_margin">20dp</dimen>
<dimen name="emoji_size">80sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_emoji_size">28sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_name_size">20sp</dimen>
<dimen name="habit_item_padding">20dp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_size">72dp</dimen> <dimen name="checkmark_size">28dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_small">2dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_medium">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_large">12dp</dimen>
<dimen name="elevation_0">0dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_small">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_medium">8dp</dimen>
<dimen name="line_spacing_extra">4dp</dimen> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <dimen name="fab_margin">16dp</dimen>
<!-- Emoji / icons --> <dimen name="emoji_size">64sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_emoji_size">24sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_name_size">18sp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_size">60dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_large">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="button_corner_radius">30dp</dimen> <dimen name="checkmark_size">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_12">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_16">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="stroke_width_0">0dp</dimen> <dimen name="stroke_width_1">1dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_24">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="icon_button_40">40dp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_text">22sp</dimen> <dimen name="divider_height">1dp</dimen>
<!-- Habit item spacing --> <dimen name="habit_item_padding">16dp</dimen>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <!-- Margins & paddings --> <dimen name="margin_horizontal">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_small">8dp</dimen> <dimen name="padding_default">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_padding">24dp</dimen>
<!-- Progress circle --> <dimen name="progress_circle_size">150dp</dimen>
<!-- Progress bar height --> <dimen name="progress_bar_height">12dp</dimen>
<!-- Text sizes --> <dimen name="text_percentage">28sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_title">20sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_subtitle">14sp</dimen> <dimen name="text_small">12sp</dimen>
<!-- Buttons and FAB --> <dimen name="action_button_height">60dp</dimen> <dimen name="fab_margin">16dp</dimen>
<!-- Emoji / icons --> <dimen name="emoji_size">64sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_emoji_size">24sp</dimen> <dimen name="habit_name_size">18sp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_size">60dp</dimen> <dimen name="margin_large">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="button_corner_radius">30dp</dimen> <dimen name="checkmark_size">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_12">12dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_16">16dp</dimen> <dimen name="stroke_width_0">0dp</dimen> <dimen name="stroke_width_1">1dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_corner_24">24dp</dimen> <dimen name="icon_button_40">40dp</dimen> <dimen name="emoji_button_text">22sp</dimen> <dimen name="divider_height">1dp</dimen> <!-- Card elevations --> <dimen name="card_elevation_small">2dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_medium">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="card_elevation_large">12dp</dimen>
<!-- General elevations --> <dimen name="elevation_0">0dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_small">4dp</dimen> <dimen name="elevation_medium">8dp</dimen>
<!-- Line spacing --> <dimen name="line_spacing_extra">4dp</dimen>
<!-- Habit item spacing --> <dimen name="habit_item_padding">16dp</dimen>
</resources>
